Package org.apache.juneau.rest.client

Interface RestLogLevelResolver

Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface RestLogLevelResolver
Determines the System.Logger.Level for a RestLogEntry.

Used by BasicRestLogger (and available to custom RestLogger implementations via RestLogEntry.getLevel()) to decide how to emit each log line.

The built-in DEFAULT resolver applies these ordered rules:

  • System.Logger.Level.ERROR — transport error or HTTP status ≥ 500
  • System.Logger.Level.WARNING — HTTP status ≥ 400, or response contains a Thrown header
  • System.Logger.Level.INFO — all other calls

Custom resolvers can be built using the fluent rules() builder:

Example:

RestLogLevelResolver resolver = RestLogLevelResolver.rules() .rule(System.Logger.Level.ERROR, e -> e.getStatusCode() >= 500) .rule(System.Logger.Level.WARNING, e -> e.getStatusCode() >= 400) .defaultLevel(System.Logger.Level.INFO) .build();

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the next major Juneau release (and possibly earlier).

See Also:
  • juneau-ng REST client
Since:
9.2.1

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT

      static final RestLogLevelResolver DEFAULT
      The default level resolver.
      • System.Logger.Level.ERROR — transport error (getError() != null) or HTTP status ≥ 500
      • System.Logger.Level.WARNING — HTTP status ≥ 400, or response has a Thrown header (a Juneau server-side header indicating an exception was thrown)
      • System.Logger.Level.INFO — all other calls

  • Method Details

    • resolve

      System.Logger.Level resolve(RestLogEntry entry)
      Computes the log level for the given entry.
      Parameters:
      entry - The log entry. Never null.
      Returns:
      The computed level. Never null.

    • rules

      static RestLogLevelResolver.RuleBuilder rules()
      Returns a new RestLogLevelResolver.RuleBuilder for constructing ordered predicate-based level resolvers.
      Returns:
      A new builder. Never null.
